modeling_constraints: Use portable Spectre-compatible Verilog-A and voltage contributions for public outputs.
Do not use branch-current oracles, hidden pass/fail ports, checker side channels, or testbench code in the DUT bundle.

properties.observable_contract: Reset clears vout, pump control, readiness, and regulation state; disabled operation suppresses pumping.
Enabled clock updates alternate phase_a and phase_b while never asserting both phases together.
While pump_en is active, enabled phase updates raise vout in bounded pump steps; without pumping, vout leaks downward and remains within rails.
regulation_error continuously reports target minus vout and pump_en requests pumping below the lower tolerance boundary.
Ready asserts only after three consecutive enabled clock updates within the regulation tolerance and clears outside qualification.

title: Charge-pump Voltage Multiplier Controller
